programs.title: Caught On Dashcam
programs.desc: From distracted drivers to animals on the attack, and an unmissable heroic rescue – join us for more spills and thrills from the world of driving in this brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam.

programs.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programs.desc: Troy and Pickle attempt to track down a giant python known as the Night Serpent. Meanwhile, Tess convinces Bill to try out new hunting grounds.

programs.title: Blokesworld
programs.desc: Ado and Camera 3 travel the world to prove that Blokes are the same all over the world and they all share the same passions.

programs.title: American Restoration
programs.desc: A customer brings by a disassembled 59 BMW motorcycle with a side car for Rick to restore. Will he be able to return the bike to its glory days or will missing parts force him to abandon the project?

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.sub_title: The Jenny, The Baker, The Prosthetics Maker
programs.desc: It's Brandi's birthday, so naturally, Jarrod brings her to an auction in Menifee. Darrell tries to find another 'All Ten' locker, needing a leg up to do so. Rene stands his ground to protect his honour.

programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: On the third leg of their Italian adventure, Mike and Frank head south to Sicily where an American contact agrees to show them around. Later, the search is on for a very specific vintage Vespa.
